description: Frontend pages, types, API services, and hooks for NEWS2 Auto-Calculator, Wound Photography Timeline, Infection Outbreak Tracker, and Continence Assessment Tool (features 1-4)
steps: Add TypeScript types to frontend/src/types/index.ts for: News2Assessment, News2Escalation, WoundAssessment, InfectionOutbreak, InfectionCase, ContinenceLog, ContinenceAssessment

Add API service objects to frontend/src/services/api.ts: news2Api (calculate, getHistory, getEscalations, respondToEscalation, getTrend), woundsApi (create, getTimeline, listActive, update, getBodyMap), infectionsApi (createOutbreak, list, getDetails, addCase, updateCase, updateOutbreak, getTimeline), continenceApi (logEvent, getResidentLog, getPatterns, createAssessment, getAssessment, getOverview)
Add React Query hooks to frontend/src/hooks/index.ts for all new API endpoints following existing patterns (useQuery for reads, useMutation with query invalidation for writes, toast notifications)

Create frontend/src/pages/News2Calculator.tsx - Full page with: vitals input form (respiratory rate, SpO2, supplemental O2 toggle, systolic BP, pulse, consciousness dropdown, temperature), real-time score calculation as values change, color-coded score display (green 0-4, amber 5-6, red 7+), escalation action display, history table with trend mini-chart using simple SVG, resident selector dropdown

Create frontend/src/pages/WoundTracker.tsx - Page with: wound photo upload with preview, body map SVG outline for marking wound location (front/back human silhouette with clickable regions), wound measurement form (width/height/depth, type, bed condition, exudate), timeline view showing photos side-by-side for healing comparison, status tracking (active/healing/healed)

Create frontend/src/pages/InfectionTracker.tsx - Page with: outbreak creation form (type: D&V/COVID/Flu/Other, protocol selection), affected residents list with add/remove, timeline visualization, isolation status indicators, notification triggers, resolution tracking with end date

Create frontend/src/pages/ContinenceAssessment.tsx - Page with: event logging form (type: continent/incontinent/pad_change, time, location), pattern chart showing events by hour-of-day across days, recommended toileting schedule display, pad usage statistics, dignity-focused language throughout

Register all 4 new pages in frontend/src/App.tsx: add imports, add Route elements, add NAV_ALL entries under appropriate sections with role-based access (NEWS2 and Wounds under Care section for clinical+staff roles, Infection under Governance for manager roles, Continence under Care for clinical+staff)
acceptance_criteria: All TypeScript types are exported and used by hooks/pages
All 4 pages render with proper layout following existing inline-style patterns
NEWS2 calculator shows real-time score as vitals are entered
Wound tracker has a clickable body map SVG
Infection tracker shows timeline of outbreak events
Continence page shows hourly pattern visualization
All pages are accessible from sidebar navigation
findings: All 4 frontend pages (News2Calculator, WoundTracker, InfectionTracker, ContinenceAssessment) compile cleanly. Types, API services, hooks, routes, and nav entries all added. Build succeeds (exit code 0) with dist output generated. Pre-existing TS errors in CareNotes.tsx, Emar.tsx, Incidents.tsx, and Training.tsx remain unchanged - these do not block the build. NEWS2 calculator implements real-time client-side scoring with color-coded risk display. Wound tracker has SVG body map with clickable regions. Infection tracker has dashboard stats, outbreak detail with timeline, and case management. Continence page uses dignity-focused language throughout.
